productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Blue Polo T-shirt
description: Indigo blue pique polo T-shirt, that has short sleeves, brown ribbed collar that has the Italian flag colours behind it with red tipping and tape detailing on the inseam, brown ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, brand seal embroidered on the upper left chest, appliqued number on the left sleeve, the word "Italia" on the back in heavy rubber print and vented hems
